name: opencode-plugin-preload-skills
description: Dynamic skill/tool preloading with three-tier classification and RL-driven promotion

scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const path = require('path'); const { PreloadSkillsPlugin } = require('./src/index.js'); const plugin = new PreloadSkillsPlugin({ logLevel: 'error', tiersConfigPath: path.resolve(process.cwd(), '..', '..', 'opencode-config', 'tool-tiers.json') }); const names = plugin.selectTools({ prompt: 'Remember this and check the context budget before the next test harness run' }).tools.map((tool) => tool.name); if (!names.includes('supermemory_search') || !names.includes('distill_run_tool')) throw new Error('preload routing smoke failed'); console.log('preload-skills smoke ok');"
